content.en:
"It's finally time to break through!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

He has cultivated for so long, and with the assistance of three thousand kites, he is now about to break through to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord realm.

Once you break through, it won't be long before you can hit the Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

How could he not be agitated?

Only by becoming a Legendary Realm Lord can he be qualified to rank among the high-level combat power of the Void Region, otherwise he will not be able to deal with any Legendary Realm Lord.

"Moreover, after becoming a Legendary Realm Lord, with the power of my Supreme Legendary Body, plus the Time Defense Supreme Technique Time Barrier, I'm afraid that even ordinary Legendary Realm Lords will not be able to annihilate my body. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, his fourth time supreme skill is finally about to be comprehended.

This time, the fourth time supreme skill he created was the amplification time to the highest, and he now has no shortage of attack, defense, and speed, so the amplification time to the advanced is especially important.

Space and time contain everything, so time can also be derived into amplification forces.

And this time, what Ye Tian tried to create was a realm amplification time supreme technique, in this time realm, Ye Tian could greatly increase his attack power and the power of time dripping, and his strength would increase a lot.

And it is difficult to create such a time supreme skill, but at least it is about to be created.

After some years passed, Ye Tian became a half-step legendary realm first.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body is transforming, and his body is completely fused with the will rule heaven and earth, which is equivalent to breaking the shackles, and the endless power of heaven and earth from the outside world is pouring into his body, and the endless source energy, will power, and rule power are all turning into his own power.

At this time, his supreme legendary body also broke the shackles and was promoted to a new level.

The strength is constantly skyrocketing, this is the transformation of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

At the same time, Ye Tian's sixth-order will was also improving.

Originally, his sixth-order will was only in the middle stage, but now he instantly crossed over to the late stage, and finally reached the level of the sixth-order peak will.

However, the sixth-order peak Eternal Will to the seventh-order Eternal Will is a big shackle, and it is not so easy to break through.

However, it was already very good to be able to ascend to the sixth-order peak will this time.

When he stepped into the Legendary Realm Lord realm, the Eternal Will would inevitably be able to be raised to the seventh order, or even more than the early stage of the seventh order, and it was possible to directly reach the peak will of the seventh order.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai stabilized the realm of the half-step Legendary Realm.

"It's so powerful, I feel like I can pinch my previous self to death." "

Ye Tian was shocked

He guessed that his current strength was not comparable to that of a Legendary Realm Lord, even if it couldn't be compared, it wasn't much worse.

"I don't know when, I can try it out with a Legendary Realm Lord."

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had just broken through, and now he was not suitable to attack the Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

Although it is difficult to continue to improve his strength after reaching the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, his Supreme Legendary Body can be improved again, and when the Supreme Legendary Body cannot be improved, the power of the half-step Legendary Body has increased to a certain extent.

At that time, he can go to the Legendary Realm Lord Realm, and it won't be long before that.

And.

There is a treasure in the Time Merchant House that can quickly raise the legendary body and half-step legendary power of the half-step Legendary Realm Lord to the peak, and the price is not expensive, so the increase itself is not large.

That kind of treasure is called Eternal Divine Water, and Xingjin Eternal Divine Water is only 10 billion time coins.

Ye Tian didn't know how much Eternal Divine Water he needed, but it should be about the same to buy ten catties, so most of the Legendary Realm Lords could refine a few catties of Eternal Divine Water.

However, most of the half-step Legendary Realm Lords would not waste time buying Eternal Divine Water, because there was no need, they would rather cultivate and improve slowly, because it was useless to improve quickly, and they would not be blocked by the big shackles of the Legendary Realm?

It is better to improve one's cultivation while perceiving time or space.

It is really a waste to waste so many resources to buy Eternal Divine Water.

But Ye Tian didn't care, he just wanted to attack the Legendary Realm Lord earlier.

"Then let's go to the Time Firm!"

Ye Tian flew out of the True Immortal Land and crossed the space in one step, preparing to descend on the Infinite Sea Branch of the Time Firm.

But just when he left the True Void Holy Land, the Star Lord, who had been perceiving time and space and spying on Ye Tian, sensed that Ye Tian had come out.

"It's definitely the body!"

The Star Lord said.

According to normal thinking, the headquarters is the ontology, the clone is in other places, and Ye Tian came out of the True Saintless Land, what is this not the ontology?

Immediately, the Trick Star Lord made a move, directly across the long river of time, and slammed into Ye Tian with one hand.

He didn't use the Star Arrow, because he didn't bring it, the Star Arrow is very valuable, it is a median eternal treasure that fuses a lot of sand and gravel in the sky and sea, and his clone may not be able to escape, is it given to the True No Holy Land with the Star Arrow?

Moreover, a transcendent realm legendary lord is just a one-handed kill.

"'Hey, no, it's a half-step Legendary Realm Lord!'"

The Tricky Star Lord sensed Ye Tian's cultivation, but his movements did not stop at all.

As long as he doesn't enter the Legendary Realm Lord, he can kill him.

......

"Star Lord!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised that the Tricky Star Lord actually attacked and killed him.

He didn't have time to think about it, and immediately cast the time barrier of the time supreme level, and urged the supreme legend body with all his might.

At the same time, time escapes.

However, Time Escape did not dodge the attack of the Trick Star Lord, after all, the other party was the Lord of the Legendary Realm, and it was still difficult to dodge his attack with a supreme skill.

Rumble!!!!

The Star Lord's blow attacked Ye Tian's body, the time barrier shattered, and the Supreme Legend Body cracked.

However, Ye Tian blocked it and was not erased.

"Time drips!"

Ye Tian counterattacked the Star Lord.

Airplanes!!!

A drop of time dripping water bombarded the Trick Star Lord, and the Trick Star Lord wanted to ignore the blow, but the power of the time drop barely reached the realm of the Legendary Realm Lord, and he couldn't ignore the fire.

Bang!!!

With a blow of time, the Star Lord was shaken back.

Then, one after another Legendary Realm Lords appeared, and they were the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land

"Star Lord, you are looking for death!"

Lord Longgu said angrily.

The Star Lord dared to attack and kill Ye Tian, this was the real anger of the True Saintless Land!_

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
